name: Eggplant Ole (Adapted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Lightly spray a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish with Pam cooking spray.
3. In a large non-stick skillet, sauté onion, garlic, and eggplant.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, for 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Add remaining ingredients to the skillet and mix well.
7. Spoon the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
8. Bake covered for 30 minutes.
